name: A1-sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all spices (except the last six ingredients) in a blender and process until they form a fine powder.
2. In a saucepan over low heat, mix half of the white vinegar with the powdered spices. Simmer for 1 hour, gradually adding the remaining vinegar as the mixture reduces in volume. Stir in Tabasco, Rhine wine, Rose wine, Kitchen Bouquet, and Postum powder.
3. Cook for an additional 3 minutes to dissolve all ingredients.
4. Remove from heat and let cool completely.
5. Strain the sauce through a cheesecloth six times into a glass container or Tupperware.
6. Cover tightly and store in the refrigerator indefinitely. For long-term storage, freeze the sauce in portions suitable for individual use.
